release_condition: All three platform profile rows are set/live with profile_link_set_date and traceable proof.
fallback_action: Use profile proof import templates; do not publish first batch yet.

release_condition: First batch has three verified HTTPS post URLs written back.
fallback_action: Publish only after profile gate opens; reject placeholder URLs.
blocker: first batch post URLs are not all verified

release_condition: Each first-batch post has site_clicks, quiz_starts, quiz_completions or checked-zero proof.
fallback_action: Keep KPI rows blank until the source was checked; 0 requires proof.
blocker: minimum KPI rows need checked source proof

release_condition: Weekly review is ready and empty-data mode is false before changing route or commerce emphasis.
fallback_action: Keep collect_signal active; do not choose winner, paid CTA, Luna, or affiliate emphasis.
blocker: empty data mode is still active

release_condition: At least one guardian/intake route has repeated real demand, explicit consent, and traceable evidence.
fallback_action: Keep collecting real requests; do not build paid or priority offers from weak demand.
blocker: no repeated consented real lead demand route

release_condition: Offer experiment plan has at least one READY row with matching evidence and safety boundaries.
fallback_action: Keep offer rows on HOLD; do not add paid CTA to first-touch Shorts.
